name: @oxidejs/monorepo
description: OxideJS: A modular, high-performance machine learning library for TypeScript with Rust acceleration.

scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/layers && npm run build -w packages/models
scripts.postinstall: node -e "try{require('child_process').execSync('npm run build:rust -w @oxidejs/core',{stdio:'inherit'})}catch(e){console.warn('[oxidejs] Rust build skipped — native acceleration unavailable.')}"

author: Akhyar
